rows.Event Name: Free Wellness On The Green Event
rows.Event Description: Wellness on the Lawn! April 25, 9AM–12PM | FREE Fitness classes, cold plunge, sauna, mimosas, IV bar & giveaways. Free + family-friendly Join us at Desert Ridge Marketplace for the Wellness on the Green Wellness Event on the AMC Lawn from 9AM-12PM for a morning of wellness, movement, and relaxation. Experience multiple FREE fitness classes, including classes from Reformed Pilates, PVOLVE( Jennifer Anisten's fitness company), refresh in our cold plunge and sauna, sip mimosas at our mobile Sip & Stroll bar, and boost your energy at the on-site IV station. Plus, enjoy giveaways, wellness-inspired surprises, and more as you recharge. This free, family-friendly event is the perfect way to glow, flow, and feel your best – don’t miss it!

April is Filipino Food Month, and we’re celebrating the best way we know how… with a community food festival! Get ready to celebrate April - Filipino Food Month with music, food, and fun at the Filipinos Food Festival! Hosted by AZ Filipinos. This celebration will be a vibrant mix of tradition, talent, and togetherness. BYO Chair/Banig/Picnic Blanket :) Our mission is to connect Filipino Americans in Arizona through community building, culture, and celebration. AZ Filipinos aims to cultivate a vibrant, intergenerational Filipino community in Phoenix that honors our heritage, empowers our future, and creates inclusive spaces where every Filipino whether born here or newly arrived feels seen, celebrated, and connected.

rows.Event Name: 22nd Annual Kappa League Scholarship and Awards Showcase
rows.Event Description: Get ready for the 22nd Annual Kappa League Scholarship and Awards Showcase - a night of celebrating achievements and supporting education! Kappa League is not just an organization; it's a movement dedicated to empowering young men across the valley. Through mentorship, career opportunities, and exposure, Kappa League instills values of leadership, personal growth, and academic excellence in its members. Our program brings together successful men with 6th – 12th grade male students from diverse backgrounds, nurturing their potential and guiding them towards a brighter future. The Annual Kappa League Showcase is the end-of-year celebration highlighting the accomplishments of the Kappa League Scholars. It serves as an opportunity for the Scholars to showcase skills they've learned during the program. It's also an opportunity to raise funds for the Kappa League program to ensure the programs continued success Da’Shaun Holmes, a proud native of St. Petersburg, FL, is a shining example of what focus, drive, and a passion for learning can accomplish. At The Canterbury School of Florida, he distinguished himself early—excelling academically while actively contributing to organizations such as Mu Alpha Theta and the Science National Honor Society. With a clear vision for his future, Da’Shaun pursued Mechanical Engineering at Florida Atlantic University, where his dedication and ingenuity quickly set him apart. In December 2023, he earned his bachelor’s degree and made history at FAU’s Senior Design Showcase, becoming the first student to win both the People’s Choice Award and the Judge’s Choice Award for his innovative senior project. Before crossing the graduation stage, Da’Shaun was selected for a competitive internship with Honeywell Aerospace in Phoenix, AZ, where he trained as an Advanced Manufacturing Engineer. His performance led to a full-time offer in his hometown—but his ambition didn’t stop there. Recognizing where he could make the greatest impact, Da’Shaun returned to Arizona, earning a promotion and continuing to excel in his engineering career. Today, Da’Shaun not only stands as a rising leader in aerospace engineering but also as a proud member of Kappa Alpha Psi Fraternity, Inc., embracing excellence, achievement, and service in everything he pursues
rows.Place: George Washington Carver Museum and Cultural Center

High energy warehouse event featuring top house and EDM DJ's, dancers, fire performers, and immersive vibes until sunrise. Step into a high energy warehouse experience designed to bring people together through music, movement, and connection. This is a Three stage event featuring a powerful collaboration of nightlife producers, promoters, and DJ's delivering house, EDM, and late-night circuit energy from 10PM until sunrise. The mainstage will deliver the heartbeat of the night, while a transformed party bus stage offers an intimate high intensity dance experience, and a Big Black Bus Stage will provide a karaoke escape to live your best popstar life. Throughout the evening and early morning attendees can expect: Gogo performers Fire performers A fully immersed lighting experience Food and Beverage trucks Pop-up venders Outdoor space This event is about more than muisc. It is about creating a safe, inclusive space where different communities intersect, house heads, ravers, circuit lovers, allies, and newcomers alike. Come dressed to express. Come ready to move. Come ready to connect. This is not just a party. It's a moment. It's new memories made for a lifetime.
